summary: Rename /simplify-this to /overcomplicated (9 file updates) + add family challenge mode to /blueprint (6-role generational debate with vault-backed elders) + wire /overcomplicated and /simplify into blueprint workflow

spec_digest.change_b: New --challenge=family mode: Children (defend/assert, parallel) → Mother (synthesize strengths) → Father (find weaknesses, refine) → Elder Council (vault queries, historical validation, convergence verdict). Max 3 rounds. Timeouts: 10min/round, 25min total.
spec_digest.change_c: Wire /overcomplicated as post-challenge complexity check in Stage 3
spec_digest.change_d: Wire /simplify as post-implementation suggestion in Stage 7

open_questions: Elder split (grandmother/grandfather) deferred to future when vault depth justifies it
Persona strengthening for existing agents out of scope
